sections.paragraph:
verb להינקות

be cleaned, cleansed; be exonerated, acquitted

verb לנקות

to clean, cleanse; exonerate, acquit, exculpate

verb נוקה

be cleaned, cleansed

verb נוקה

be exonerated, acquitted

verb להתנקות

to clean oneself, cleanse oneself; exonerate oneself

verb להניק

to suckle, breast-feed, nurse

verb הונק

be suckled, breast-fed, nursed

verb לנקות (>>ניקה)

to clean, cleanse; exonerate, acquit, exculpate
